title: Scheduled Task Execution (scheduler.check)
activity_flow: → print L4 cron result; on exception → log error
check(): if TASKS dir does not exist → return None [END]
check(): for each .json file in TASKS (sorted):
→ load JSON task definition; on parse error → log + continue
→ on invalid schedule format → log error + continue
→ if (now_minutes - sched_minutes) > max_delay * 60 → log SKIP + continue
→ _last_run(tid, done_files): scan done_files for '*_{tid}.md', parse timestamps, return latest datetime
→ if last_run exists AND (now - last_run) < cooldown → skip (continue)
→ return task prompt string with [定时任务], [报告路径], SOP instruction, prompt body, done report path
check(): if no task triggered → return None [END]
batch_process_flow: → if no files → return zero-stats dict
→ _existing_sessions(l4_dir): read SESSION: lines from all_histories.txt → set
→ read file, extract timestamps from Prompt/Response markers
if session name already in existing → skip (dup), delete tmp file
else: results.append((sn, dst, extract_history(dst), info, fp))
→ if dry_run=True → cleanup tmp, return stats [END]
→ Phase 2 (append history): open all_histories.txt append mode
for each result: format_history_block(sn, hist) → write
for each month: open/create {YYYY-MM}.zip, write compressed .txt files
delete processed raw files (skip 'recent' skipped files)
→ return report dict {processed, skipped, errors, new_sessions, deleted_raw}
conditions_and_branches: last_run AND elapsed < cooldown → skip (cooldown active)
batch_process: dry_run=True → no writes, return preview stats
batch_process: session name in existing → skip duplicate
key_relationships: scheduler.check() calls _last_run() to determine last execution
scheduler.check() calls _parse_cooldown() to compute cooldown window
scheduler.check() calls batch_process() every 12h (L4 cron gate)
batch_process() calls compress_session() per raw file
batch_process() calls extract_history() per compressed file
_compress_raw() calls _parse_sections() to split text by markers
batch_process() calls format_history_block() to format output
important_notes: Port lock on 127.0.0.1:45762 prevents duplicate scheduler instances
INTERVAL=120s, ONCE=False — scheduler runs in a loop externally
check() returns a prompt string on first triggered task (one task per call)
L4 cron is independent of task JSON files — always runs every 12h
batch_process dry_run=True is safe default; called with dry_run=False by scheduler
Stale-task protection: max_delay_hours (default 6h) prevents late boot triggers
Raw session format B strips system prompt section and assistant echo sections
Session deduplication via all_histories.txt SESSION: header lines
